# catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode (Data Source)

This data source can read the Fabric Multicast Replication Mode.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode" "example" {
  id        = "8e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
  fabric_id = "8e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fabric_id` (String) Fabric Site ID
- `id` (String) The id of the object

### Read-Only

- `replication_mode` (String) Replication Mode deployed in the fabric site
